_comment: Documents EVERY config key with NO real secrets (DL-011). Copy to appsettings.json / set env vars for dev; in prod, KV-backed values come from Vault via VaultSharp and bind into the Options pattern (IOptions<T>, ValidateOnStart). Required keys must fail at startup if missing.

DotNet.TargetFramework: net10.0 (default LTS; switch to net8.0 only on architect instruction)

Vault._enabled: false = dev fallback (config from appsettings.json + env); true = load KV secrets at startup via VaultSharp
Vault._kvSecretPath: KV v2 path whose fields use .NET config paths, e.g. 'Anthropic:ApiKey', 'ConnectionStrings:Postgres'

Redis._role: IDistributedCache only — NOT the queue broker

Hangfire._store: PostgreSQL (separate schema; holds no brand data)

Embeddings._baseUrlOptions: host-installed Ollama, api in compose (default): http://host.docker.internal:11434 | host-installed Ollama, api via dotnet run: http://localhost:11434 | in-compose Ollama (docker compose --profile embeddings up): http://embeddings:11434
Embeddings._dimensionRule: MUST equal the pgvector column dimension set in the EF migration
Embeddings._prefixes: search_document: on ingest, search_query: on queries (mandatory)

Meta._modes: mock (default, demo runs with zero live Meta) | live (optional bonus, paid actions human-gated)

Logging._note: structured logging; never log secrets, tokens, or decrypted Meta tokens
